PLAINTIFF TO FILE BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF SHALL OBTAIN A CERTIFICATE OF INSURANCE IN THE SUM OF $2,000,000.00.
